message:
style(wa-2ojrv): apply rustfmt collapse to integration test file

No logic change — rustfmt collapsed several multi-line method-chain
calls to single lines after the initial commit (94b670f9) landed.
This commit applies the formatter's preferred shape so cargo fmt
--check stays clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
